fixture: 055_qualified_table_names

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE a.b.c (id INTEGER)
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 0A000] at 1:14 (offset 13): qualified table names deeper than schema.table are not supported in Phase 1

statement 2:
  sql:
    DROP TABLE a.b.c
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 42P01] at 1:12 (offset 11): table reference "a.b.c" is not supported in Phase 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO a.b.c VALUES (1)
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 42P01] at 1:13 (offset 12): table reference "a.b.c" is not supported in Phase 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    UPDATE a.b.c SET id = 1
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 42P01] at 1:8 (offset 7): table reference "a.b.c" is not supported in Phase 1

statement 5:
  sql:
    DELETE FROM a.b.c
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 42P01] at 1:13 (offset 12): table reference "a.b.c" is not supported in Phase 1
